## Checklist

- [ ] I updated documentation (`README.md`) when needed
- [ ] I prepared release-note content for user-visible changes
- [ ] `composer validate --strict` passes
- [ ] `composer check-cs` passes
- [ ] `composer phpstan` passes
- [ ] `composer deptrac` passes
